High-floor unit

Ideally positioned in the heart of Dubai Marina, Botanica Tower enjoys a prime waterfront location, offering breathtaking views of the Marina, the Arabian Gulf, and Palm Jumeirah. This luxury development combines premium living with a unique feature that truly sets it apart — a tropical sky garden occupying the entire 22nd floor, allowing residents to enjoy panoramic views of Dubai's iconic skyline.

Building Amenities:

Swimming pool
Jacuzzi
Children's pool
Fully equipped gymnasium
Steam room
Secure covered parking
24-hour security
Marina and sea views
Walking distance to the beach

Dubai Marina is one of Dubai's most vibrant waterfront communities, offering an exceptional lifestyle with a wide selection of restaurants, cafés, retail outlets, supermarkets, and renowned hotels right on your doorstep.

Residents also enjoy easy access to Dubai Marina Mall and Jumeirah Beach Residence (JBR), home to an array of dining, entertainment, and leisure options, as well as some of Dubai's most popular beaches.

Contact Betterhomes today to arrange a viewing.

DEC Towers is a residential complex in Dubai Marina, consisting of two mid-rise towers offering a mix of studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. description:

At its core is a sculpted natural stone kitchen designed for direct cooking—eliminating the need for conventional stovetops. A bespoke 360-degree rotating ceiling-mounted TV, finished in matching stone, reflects the seamless design language throughout. Everyday features such as the sink, flush, and storage elements are discreetly integrated into stone surfaces, revealing themselves only when needed—creating a clean, minimalist aesthetic with cutting-edge functionality.

Located in the prestigious Tiara Aquamarine tower on Palm Jumeirah, the apartment has undergone a full high-end transformation. title: 2 Bed | Dual Aspect | Partial Upgrade
description:
Positioned within one of Al Barari’s most sought-after addresses, this beautifully presented two-bedroom residence in Seventh Heaven offers a rare blend of space, light, and dual-aspect living.

Spanning an impressive 2,662 sq.ft, the apartment has been thoughtfully maintained and selectively upgraded, creating a turnkey home that balances contemporary design with everyday functionality. The expansive open-plan living and dining area is framed by floor-to-ceiling glazing, drawing in natural light throughout the day and seamlessly connecting to two private balconies - each offering a distinct outlook and the choice between tranquil northern or sun-soaked southern exposure.

The kitchen is sleek and refined, complete with a central island and high-quality integrated appliances, flowing effortlessly into the main living space - ideal for both entertaining and relaxed daily living.

Both bedrooms are generously proportioned, with upgraded flooring adding warmth and sophistication. The secondary bedroom enjoys open views towards the Downtown skyline, while the principal suite offers a more private retreat with ample storage and a well-appointed en-suite. Additional enhancements include bespoke built-in TV walls and a refined entrance hallway, elevating the overall finish of the home.

A standout feature rarely found in similar layouts is the large dedicated laundry and storage room, providing exceptional practicality without compromising on living space.

Set within the greenery of Al Barari, Seventh Heaven remains one of Dubai’s most architecturally distinct developments, offering residents a unique lifestyle surrounded by nature, yet within close proximity to the city.

This is an ideal opportunity for both end-users and investors seeking a spacious, well-upgraded apartment in one of Dubai’s most prestigious communities.

Discovery Gardens is a perfect community for singles and families looking for an affordable, green, and pedestrian-friendly neighborhood in Dubai.
Situated close to Ibn Battuta Mall, the area provides a self-sufficient lifestyle with convenient access to supermarkets, petrol stations, restaurants, and laundry facilities.
Developed by Nakheel in 2009, Discovery Gardens is known for its lively low-rise apartment buildings and extensive green spaces, ideal for walking and outdoor activities.
Residents can also take advantage of community swimming pools and tennis courts. The neighborhood mainly attracts mid-income South Asian families and corporate professionals.
Nestled in vibrant Jebel Ali, Discovery Gardens offers seamless connectivity via Sheikh Zayed Road and E311, plus its own metro station. You’re just minutes from:
-Ibn Battuta Mall (5 min)
-Dubai Marina (10 min)
-Downtown Dubai (25 min)

Location and Connectivity:

Cayan Tower sits at the mouth of Dubai Marina, offering residents direct access to the iconic Marina Walk  a scenic, tree-lined promenade lined with cafes, restaurants, and boutiques. Dubai Marina Mall is within close reach, featuring over 140 retail stores, Waitrose, Reel Cinemas, and a range of dining options. The community also boasts Pier 7, a seven-level waterfront dining destination, as well as the Dubai Marina Yacht Club for boating and leisure enthusiasts. JBR Beach is a short walk away.

Dubai Marina is strategically located along Sheikh Zayed Road, offering swift connectivity to Dubai Media City, Dubai Internet City, and Downtown Dubai. Residents benefit from two Metro stations  DMCC and Sobha Realty  as well as the Dubai Tram linking to JBR, Al Sufouh, and Palm Jumeirah, complemented by water taxis and ferry services for a truly multi-modal commute.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact Reece James Hughes.

description:
Positioned on the first floor within the ever-sought-after Ashjar residences, this exceptional three-bedroom plus maid’s apartment offers a rare sense of privacy, seamlessly immersed within Al Barari’s lush, green canopy.

Spanning a thoughtfully reconfigured layout, the home has undergone a series of considered enhancements to elevate both form and function. The kitchen has been enclosed to create a more defined culinary space, complemented by bespoke built-in cabinetry throughout, delivering both clean aesthetics and practical storage solutions. A fully integrated water filtration system further enhances the everyday living experience.

The heart of the home opens into an expansive living and dining area, framed by floor-to-ceiling glazing that draws in an abundance of natural light while maintaining complete privacy from surrounding greenery. Soft, neutral tones and refined finishes create a calm, understated luxury that flows consistently throughout.

Each of the three bedrooms is generously proportioned, with the primary suite offering a tranquil retreat overlooking the treetops. The additional maid’s room is discreetly positioned, ideal for both live-in support or flexible use.

A defining feature of this residence is the large wrap-around terrace - a true extension of the living space. Surrounded by mature landscaping, it offers multiple zones for lounging and entertaining, capturing the essence of indoor-outdoor living that Al Barari is renowned for.

Set within one of Dubai’s most exclusive, end-user driven communities, residents benefit from unparalleled greenery, privacy, and a lifestyle centred around wellness and nature.
